meta.scope: Space detail connected-source knowledge selection for indexed Onyx connectors
meta.coverage_definition: 100% means every requirement in this scoped PRD maps to at least one stored local TestSprite test or an explicit static/unit fallback. It is not whole-repository line or branch coverage.

product_overview: Spaces can use already-indexed connector knowledge without copying SharePoint/connector files as uploads. Admins continue to configure intranet connectors in the admin panel; space editors can attach indexed hierarchy nodes/folders/sites and exact indexed documents as space-scoped retrieval context. Uploaded local files remain separate from connected-source selections. Retrieval uses selected scopes while preserving per-user ACL filtering.
core_goals: Keep connector setup and permission sync in existing Onyx connector/admin flows.
Let space editors scope a space to indexed connector folders/sites/documents from the existing hierarchy model.
Keep uploaded files and connected-source references distinct in API, persistence, retrieval, and UI.
Ensure selecting a connector document/folder in a space never grants document access to users who could not otherwise retrieve it.
Prove the real browser flow can open the space right-rail picker and save/reload a connected-source selection when seeded hierarchy is available.

requirements.title: Persist space connected-source exact documents
requirements.description: A space stores selected indexed connector document IDs separately from uploaded user files and returns them through project detail/connected-knowledge APIs.
observable_behaviors: PUT /api/user/projects/{id}/connected-knowledge accepts document_ids.
GET /api/user/projects/{id}/connected-knowledge returns selected document snapshots.
GET /api/user/projects/{id}/details includes connected_knowledge.documents.

requirements.title: Persist space connected-source hierarchy nodes
requirements.description: A space stores selected indexed connector hierarchy node IDs (folders/sites/libraries) separately from uploaded user files and returns them through project detail/connected-knowledge APIs.
observable_behaviors: PUT /api/user/projects/{id}/connected-knowledge accepts hierarchy_node_ids.
GET /api/user/projects/{id}/connected-knowledge returns selected hierarchy node snapshots.
Project detail reload preserves selected folders/sites.

requirements.title: Require space edit access for connected-source updates
requirements.description: Only users with space edit access can update connected-source selections; viewers can read but not mutate.
observable_behaviors: Viewer update attempts are rejected by the real project API path.
Owner/editor update attempts can save valid accessible selections.

requirements.title: Validate connector document and hierarchy access before attaching
requirements.description: Space editors cannot attach indexed connector documents or hierarchy nodes they cannot access.
observable_behaviors: Inaccessible document selection is rejected.
Inaccessible hierarchy node selection is rejected.
Accessible public or ACL-matching selections can be attached.

requirements.title: Use space connected-source selections in retrieval without bypassing ACLs
requirements.description: Project chat/search uses selected exact document IDs and hierarchy node IDs as retrieval scope while intersecting with the requesting user's normal access-control filters.
observable_behaviors: Space connected-source selections are copied into SearchParams and SearchTool PersonaSearchInfo.
SearchTool/search_pipeline passes selected doc/node filters to the document index.
A viewer cannot retrieve an owner-only selected document even when the owner attached it to the shared space.

requirements.title: Expose connected sources distinctly from uploaded files in the space right rail
requirements.description: The space right rail shows uploaded files and connected-source selections as separate concepts and launches a modal for indexed connector selection.
observable_behaviors: Right rail includes a Connected sources section separate from Files.
Existing Files add/upload controls remain available.
Selected connector folders/documents render under Connected sources.

requirements.title: Provide real browser E2E coverage for the space connected-source picker
requirements.description: The authenticated browser flow opens a real space, opens the connected-source picker, exercises a seeded connector hierarchy path when available, saves and reloads the selection, and still verifies local upload controls and existing links/share affordances.
observable_behaviors: Deep Spaces Playwright smoke opens the connected-source picker from the right rail.
When selectable hierarchy rows exist, the smoke selects one, saves, reloads, and verifies the selection in the rail.
When no indexed connector hierarchy exists, the smoke records the honest empty-state branch rather than silently omitting it.
Existing local file upload, link, skills, scheduled task, and share controls still render.

test_environment.runner: local testsprite-rs with existing Onyx services and Playwright admin project
